subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Tahir! On this Day the Speaker of Sinai is seated upon the Throne of Manifestation and uttereth this most exalted Word: O people of Bahá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد طاهر امروز مکلم طور بر عرش ظهور مستوی و باین کلمه علیا ناطق یا اهل البها
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
